title: What if she just kicked their arses
display_title: What if she just kicked their arses
wikitext:
[]: What if she just kicked their arses...             Quote Post by master0rolando » Tue Sep 05, 2006 3:01 am what if Yui had simply decided to kill the MPs... what would Lilith have done?...its one thing for Rei to help Shinji...Rei would probly stop and go on with life...but Lilith on the other hand...who was probly in control there...may think differently...

[]:             Quote Post by Faußtin » Tue Sep 05, 2006 5:52 am Well... There is no longer a Rei or a Lilith, or at least I think so. They merged into a single, third being. But there is no real evidence I could put on the table. L\R would probably go away, and Shinji would live on without his mother and sister, and with his utterly fucked-up father. This is my theory, again without any realy thick reason why. Just a thought.

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Tue Sep 05, 2006 9:42 am Somehow I don't think Rei would abandon him that easily, not after abandoning Gendo at the last minute and all.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Tue Sep 05, 2006 12:37 pm FauÃŸtin wrote: Well... There is no longer a Rei or a Lilith, or at least I think so. They merged into a single, third being.

[]:             Quote Post by Legend of the Past » Tue Sep 05, 2006 12:44 pm If Yui-sama would be able to beat nine EVAs and ruin their S2 organs, that is. Though I don't doubt she could. Hmm... Depends on if Rei was even in control in the hybrid, if her will to help Shinji had passed forth. If so... I don't know. I think Third Impact would be inevtiable after the Forbidden Joining. GNR hybrid is an Angel, obviously, so I think she'd still complete 3I.

[]:             Quote Post by master0rolando » Tue Sep 05, 2006 5:08 pm she cant do it without Unit 01 though...Unit 01 forms the tree of life...no 3I with ne Tree of Life..(or wisdom or wahtever) anyway...if Asuka was able to beat up the MPs like she did (she wouldve eventually won if she hadnt gotten hit by such a cheap shot and didnt have a time limit...)...the MPs just werent dead yet...if she had tonr them to shreds...they wouldnt be a problem... Yui couldve beaten them easily...Shinji couldve beaten them...

[]:             Quote Post by Legend of the Past » Wed Sep 06, 2006 7:18 am master0rolando wrote: anyway...if Asuka was able to beat up the MPs like she did

[]:             Quote Post by tinmeigut » Wed Sep 06, 2006 7:58 am Yea it's just tactically disadvantageous for Eva-02 to fight the MP Evas just by herself without Shinji's help. And indeed without the S^2 Organ you're just like a malfunctioning JA confronting Eva-01. Also Remember Eva-02 wasn't equipped with any weapons.

[]:             Quote Post by Legend of the Past » Wed Sep 06, 2006 9:31 am tinmeigut wrote: Eva-02 wasn't equipped with any weapons.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Sep 06, 2006 1:50 pm tinmeigut wrote: Remember Eva-02 wasn't equipped with any weapons.

[]:             Quote Post by master0rolando » Thu Sep 07, 2006 1:27 am let me quote myself here master0rolando wrote: if Asuka was able to beat up the MPs like she did (she wouldve eventually won if she hadnt gotten hit by such a cheap shot and didnt have a time limit...)

[]:             Quote Post by zeaven » Thu Sep 07, 2006 3:29 am Mr. Tines wrote: tinmeigut wrote: Remember Eva-02 wasn't equipped with any weapons.

[]:             Quote Post by tinmeigut » Thu Sep 07, 2006 4:35 am Well well well I mean she originally wasn't equipped with normal weapons like the assault rifle that would be necessary to deal with the enemies properly.

[]:             Quote Post by Legend of the Past » Thu Sep 07, 2006 7:53 am tinmeigut wrote: Well well well I mean she originally wasn't equipped with normal weapons.

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Thu Sep 07, 2006 7:54 am The MP Evas would have been screwed if Asuka hadn't wasted all the good firepower on Zeruel. Given the way she was mowing through them, they must not have had much AT fieldness to speak of.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Sep 07, 2006 7:54 am zeaven wrote: But hey, surprises are awesome too.

[]:             Quote Post by zeaven » Thu Sep 07, 2006 9:09 am Reichu wrote: zeaven wrote: But hey, surprises are awesome too.

[]:             Quote Post by Israfel777 » Thu Sep 07, 2006 9:16 am Mr. Tines wrote: tinmeigut wrote: Remember Eva-02 wasn't equipped with any weapons.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Sep 07, 2006 9:18 am Israfel777 wrote: Besides, that leaves after the whole battle, with Eva-08 throwing the Heavy Lance which reverted to a Lance of Longinus duplicate.

[]:             Quote Post by tinmeigut » Thu Sep 07, 2006 9:20 am Well then which one of them threw it? Maybe Eva-02 just attracted the Lance towards her like the two sides of a magnet.
